title: RoboLineage PolicyMeta
description: Per-checkpoint metadata file. trained_on_dataset is bound to a single DatasetLock and must never be edited. Mirrors robolineage_contracts.pipeline.PolicyMeta. See docs/artifact_contracts.md.

version_id.description: SemVer. Major = architecture change; minor = dataset version roll; patch = same data, different seed.

trained_on_dataset.description: DatasetLock.version_id this checkpoint was trained on. Immutable post-write.

eval_success_rate.description: Filled by external eval or RoboLineage policy evaluation; null until evaluation completes.

deployed.description: True iff this policy is the active deployed checkpoint. Requires gating_result='pass'.

framework_name.description: Optional host training framework name inferred or supplied by FrameworkDiscoveryAgent.

framework_type.description: Optional coarse framework label such as generic, act_like, vla_like, diffusion_policy or lerobot.

checkpoint_path.description: Optional resolved checkpoint path chosen from the host framework output.

training_result_path.description: Optional path to RoboLineage's structured framework training result artifact.

eval_result_path.description: Optional path to the host framework eval result artifact.

ROBOLINEAGE_context_path.description: Optional path to RoboLineage context linking this checkpoint back to post-review, dataset and framework artifacts.
